scripts.postinstall: sed -i '' 's/export type Accessor<T> = () => T;/export type Accessor<T> = stable () => T;/' node_modules/solid-js/types/reactive/signal.d.ts && sed -i '' 's/export type Signal<T> = \[get: Accessor<T>, set: Setter<T>\];/export type Signal<T> = [get: Accessor<T>, set: mutator Setter<T> invalidates get];/' node_modules/solid-js/types/reactive/signal.d.ts
